claimText: Recently, in Dhanya M vs State of Kerala & Others judgement, Supreme Court set aside preventive detention under Kerala Anti-Social Activities (Prevention) Act, 2007 and held that preventive detention must not be used as a substitute for criminal prosecution or to bypass bail orders.
evidenceExcerpt: Recently, in Dhanya M vs State of Kerala & Others judgement, Supreme Court set aside preventive detention under Kerala Anti-Social Activities (Prevention) Act, 2007 and held that preventive detention must not be used as a substitute for criminal prosecution or to bypass bail orders.
